hook: Knowing what kind of man you want to be often clarifies what kind of dating choices you can respect later.
body: Identity-based standards reduce impulsive behavior because the question becomes bigger than whether the moment feels good.
voices: The School of Life, Mark Manson

hook: If you choose only by short-term relief, you often wake up with less self-respect and less clarity.
body: Let your choices answer the question of who you are becoming, not just who texted you back.
